role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is an actively-managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to achieve its objective principally by investing in equity instruments linked directly or indirectly to the performance of U.S.-listed, large capitalization, growth-oriented companies (“growth equities”) based on statistical analyses that seek to estimate the direction of growth equities. The fund is non-diversified.
